title: No Global Sounds
description: Stop global sounds like the wither's spawning, ender dragon death, end portal activation.
body:
**🚀 ITITAN Hosting - Premium, Reliable & Budget-Friendly Minecraft Servers - from just €2.50/month**

Enjoy 10% off your first month with the code **JSON10**!

This is a simple mod that sets the global sound gamerule to false everytime the game/server loads, which then stops global sounds like the wither's spawning, ender dragon death, end portal activation to not be played for everyone. 

# 🔎 Explanation

Global sounds are unique sound events broadcast to all players in the world, regardless of distance.

Examples include:

- End portal activation
- Ender Dragon death roar
- Wither spawn/charge-up sound
- Guardian “curse” attack sound
- These sounds can be disruptive on multiplayer servers, since everyone hears them even if they’re far away.
- 
# ⚠️ Why It Matters

- Server performance: Reduces unnecessary sound broadcasting.
- Player experience: Prevents confusion or annoyance when hearing sounds from events happening far away.
- Customization: Useful for roleplay servers or modpacks where immersion is important.

- Simply put this in the "mods" folder of you server or modpack. Server-side is fully supported.
